creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed (with modifications) as of ports r383714, thanks for your submission.

By the way, I do not see the need to put in into `russian' category; IMHO `emulators' suits it much better.  The mere fact that it only supports Cyrillic user interface does not warrant it.  If you would tell me we have a port for a calculator (of any origin or country) emulator, I'd look under `emulators` (notice that emulators for TI and HP calculators already live there).

Last but not least, look at the package name: ru-emkatic-0.20.  It suggest that there should be master, language-agnostic package emkatic-0.20 (and maybe other xx-emkatic packages), but this is simply not true in this case.

Consider moving it to `emulators' at some point (even better, send a patch to upstream so it gets proper English support! ;-).
